title: Krieg Unleashes Poison Gas
scene: On pages 18–21, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. The Baratie battle turns into a test of will as Luffy keeps challenging Krieg despite poison, weapons, and exhaustion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He hit that with his... bare hands!

dialogue.speaker: Krieg Pirates
dialogue.text: I've never even seen the Don on His Knees before, much less lying flat on his face!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: that kid just punched our Don right in the face! Not to mention it was through that spike- covered cape!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But don't you dare decide that question just by these Measly Spears or your stupid spinky cape!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This ain't the place for me to die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Come on, breathe! Breathe in that fresh air as much as possible!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh that's right! Do you want some of our restaurant's special pudding!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You idiot! What good would feeding a poisoned person more poison do!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What do you mean by "poison!?" and look who's talkin'!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey, my meat dishes are the world's best!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There are guys like him every now and then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: idiots that fight to the death once they decide on a goal...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: A guy like him is the worst enemy you can face...

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
